title: taraxacum phaleratum
intro: Taraxacum phaleratum is a type of dandelion, specifically a perennial weed that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and stimulate digestion. The health benefits of Taraxacum phaleratum include its potential to support liver health, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum phaleratum include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
